changes: Iteration 1: Replaced verbose original skill (573 lines of SQL/visualization/database content) with concise CSV-focused skill covering: CSV parsing, data cleaning (dedup, date standardization, missing values, invalid emails), aggregation patterns, JSON output, multi-dataset analysis
Iteration 2: Clarified that dates_standardized/missing_values/invalid_emails should be counted on unique rows only, not duplicate rows
Iteration 3: Strengthened dedup-first counting instructions with explicit step-by-step order
Iteration 4: Added Python code example showing exact algorithm — deduplicate first, then count issues on unique rows only. This fixed the persistent dates_standardized miscounting
